title: Gel PCR Product Purification
author: Izabela M Rezende
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.pxbdpin

steps.title: Drill the bottom of a 0
steps.instruction: Drill the bottom of a 0. 6 mL microcentrifuge tube with the aid of a needle

steps.title: Extract the band of expected size extracted from the gel
steps.instruction: Extract the band of expected size extracted from the gel

steps.title: Transfer the gel band into a 0
steps.instruction: Transfer the gel band into a 0. 6 mL perforated microcentrifuge tube

steps.title: Place the 0
steps.instruction: Place the 0. 6 mL microcentrifuge tube into a 1.5 ml microcentrifuge tube

steps.title: Centrifuge at 14000 x g for 1 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 14000 x g for 1 min

steps.title: Store in the freezer in the next day
steps.instruction: Store in the freezer in the next day.
